channel.title: Witness on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Witness on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Rendlesham Forest incident
item.description:
The Rendlesham Forest incident involved reported sightings of unexplained lights near Rendlesham Forest in Suffolk, England, in December 1980. USAF personnel claimed to have seen a UFO, and the event is often called “Britain’s Roswell.” Sceptics suggest the sightings were misinterpretations of a fireball, the Orfordness Lighthouse, and bright stars. The UK Ministry of Defence stated the event posed no threat to national security and was not investigated as such.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rendlesham_Forest_incident

item.title: Glenn Dennis
item.description:
Glenn Dennis, born March 24, 1925, and died April 28, 2015, was a founder of the International UFO Museum and Research Center in Roswell, New Mexico. He began working at Ballard Funeral Home in Roswell at age 15 and later became responsible for the funeral home’s military contract with Roswell Army Air Field. Dennis gained attention from UFO researchers in 1994 after contacting a tips hotline following an episode of Unsolved Mysteries about the Roswell UFO incident. While his accounts were featured in books about the incident, serious doubts were raised about his testimony, with creators of a documentary discovering he provided a fictitious name for a nurse who allegedly gave him classified information.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Glenn_Dennis
